source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Official: Good morning.
segments.translation: 早上好。

segments.text: Official: Community Learning Centre.
segments.translation: 这里是社区学习中心。

segments.text: Official: What can I do for you?
segments.translation: 请问有什么可以帮您的吗？

segments.text: Man: Oh, hello.
segments.translation: 哦，你好。

segments.text: Man: I'm calling about the sports photography course you offer.
segments.translation: 我是打电话来咨询你们开的那个体育摄影课程的。

segments.text: Man: I learned about it from an advert somewhere in the newspaper.
segments.translation: 我是在报纸上的一则广告里看到的。

segments.text: Official: OK, may I have your name, please?
segments.translation: 好的，请问您怎么称呼？

segments.text: Man: It's Chris Johnson.
segments.translation: 我叫Chris Johnson。

segments.text: Official: Thank you, Mr. Johnson.
segments.translation: 谢谢您，Johnson先生。

segments.text: Official: Is there anything in particular you would like to know?
segments.translation: 您有什么特别想了解的吗？

segments.text: Man: Yes.
segments.translation: 有的。

segments.text: Man: I'm eager to improve my photography skills.
segments.translation: 我特别想提升一下自己的摄影水平。

segments.text: Man: You know, my son has just joined the school football team this semester, and I want to keep a visual record of all these precious moments.
segments.translation: 是这样，我儿子这学期刚加入了学校足球队，我想把这些珍贵的瞬间都用照片记录下来。

segments.text: Man: But when I took shots, they were often too blurry.
segments.translation: 可我拍出来的照片经常都很模糊。

segments.text: Man: You see, I'm no expert.
segments.translation: 你也知道，我又不是什么行家。

segments.text: Man: So I'd like to find out about the level of the course to see if it's suitable for me.
segments.translation: 所以我想了解一下这个课程的难度，看看适不适合我。

segments.text: Official: Well, this course is intended for beginners only.
segments.translation: 嗯，这个课程只面向零基础的初学者。

segments.text: Official: But there will be an advanced course for experienced photographers next semester.
segments.translation: 不过下学期会有一个面向有经验摄影爱好者的进阶课程。

segments.text: Man: That's good to know.
segments.translation: 那太好了。

segments.text: Man: I think this course works for me just fine.
segments.translation: 我觉得这个课程正好适合我。

segments.text: Man: Do I have to go for an interview to register?
segments.translation: 报名需要去参加面试吗？

segments.text: Official: There is no need to do that.
segments.translation: 不用的。

segments.text: Official: We have plenty of vacancies right now.
segments.translation: 我们现在名额还很充足。

segments.text: Official: So if you plan to register, I can sign you up over the phone.
segments.translation: 所以如果您打算报名，我在电话里就可以帮您登记。

segments.text: Man: Great.
segments.translation: 太好了。

segments.text: Man: But before that, how much does it cost?
segments.translation: 不过在那之前，请问费用是多少？

segments.text: Official: It was 45 dollars last year for a single student.
segments.translation: 去年单个学员是45美元。

segments.text: Official: Luckily, this year we have more funding, so the price has gone down to 38 dollars.
segments.translation: 幸运的是，今年我们经费更充裕了，所以价格降到了38美元。

segments.text: Man: Oh, good.
segments.translation: 哦，太好了。

segments.text: Man: So when will the next course start?
segments.translation: 那下一期课程什么时候开始呢？

segments.text: Official: Let me check.
segments.translation: 我查一下。

segments.text: Official: Just a minute … It's Monday today, so there was a course that ended just last weekend.
segments.translation: 稍等……今天是星期一，有一期课程上周末刚刚结束。

segments.text: Official: Then there is another one starting from April 17th.
segments.translation: 然后还有一期是从4月17日开始的。

segments.text: Official: But if you miss this one, the next one is from May 1st.
segments.translation: 但如果您错过了这一期，再下一期就要到5月1日了。

segments.text: Man: That's too late.
segments.translation: 那太晚了。

segments.text: Man: I'll just register for the next course then.
segments.translation: 那我就报名下一期（4月17日那期）好了。

segments.text: Official: May I take your phone number?
segments.translation: 可以留一下您的电话号码吗？

segments.text: Man: Sure.
segments.translation: 当然可以。

segments.text: Official: OK, I've made a note of that.
segments.translation: 好的，我记下来了。

segments.text: Official: When you come to take the first lesson, please bring two photos that you've taken.
segments.translation: 您来上第一节课的时候，请带上两张您自己拍的照片。

segments.text: Man: Is there any special requirement for the photos?
segments.translation: 照片有什么特别的要求吗？

segments.text: Official: Yes, you reminded me.
segments.translation: 对了，多亏您提醒我。

segments.text: Official: The weather of the two shots should be different.
segments.translation: 这两张照片拍摄时的天气要不一样。

segments.text: Man: Like one on a sunny day and another on a snowy day?
segments.translation: 比如一张是晴天拍的，另一张是雪天拍的？

segments.text: Official: Yes, exactly.
segments.translation: 对，正是这样。

segments.text: Man: So apart from the photos, do I need to prepare anything else for the course?
segments.translation: 那除了照片，我还需要为这个课程准备别的东西吗？

segments.text: Official: Nothing more.
segments.translation: 别的就不用了。

segments.text: Man: Do you have a syllabus for the course?
segments.translation: 你们有课程的教学大纲吗？

segments.text: Official: Sure, you can download it from our website.
segments.translation: 当然有，您可以从我们网站上下载。

segments.text: Official: Just key in 'Community Learning Centre of Pinewood'.
segments.translation: 只要输入“Pinewood社区学习中心”就行。

segments.text: Official: You can also come over to the centre and get a copy.
segments.translation: 您也可以到中心来拿一份。

segments.text: Man: I'll just download it online.
segments.translation: 那我就直接在网上下载吧。

segments.text: Man: But can you please introduce the course in detail?
segments.translation: 不过能麻烦您详细介绍一下这个课程吗？

segments.text: Man: The course covers two days, right?
segments.translation: 课程一共两天，对吧？

segments.text: Official: Yes.
segments.translation: 对的。

segments.text: Official: On Saturday morning, the instructor will explain all the basics of amateur and professional sports photography and the differences between them, followed by instructions on the use of specific equipment for various sports, like long lenses and monopods for shooting football matches.
segments.translation: 星期六上午，老师会讲解业余和专业体育摄影的所有基础知识以及两者的区别，接着会教你针对不同运动使用特定器材，比如拍足球比赛用的长焦镜头和独脚架。

segments.text: Man: That's exactly what I need to know.
segments.translation: 这正是我想了解的。

segments.text: Man: What about the rest of the course?
segments.translation: 那课程剩下的部分呢？

segments.text: Official: On Saturday afternoon, there is normally a workshop on the technical side of things.
segments.translation: 星期六下午通常会有一个技术层面的实操工作坊。

segments.text: Official: For the photos that your classmates have brought, you'll have to work together to decide the best position to take these shots.
segments.translation: 针对同学们各自带来的照片，你们要一起讨论出拍这些照片的最佳机位。

segments.text: Man: Oh, that's interesting.
segments.translation: 哦，那挺有意思的。

segments.text: Official: On Sunday, there is a workshop taking place in a computer-equipped room where you'll learn to edit different shots.
segments.translation: 星期天会在一间配有电脑的房间里开一个工作坊，你们会在那里学习如何修不同的照片。

segments.text: Man: That sounds challenging.
segments.translation: 听起来挺有挑战性的。

segments.text: Official: Indeed, it is.
segments.translation: 确实是这样。

segments.text: Official: There is also a section on some tricks to sell them.
segments.translation: 另外还有一部分内容是讲一些把照片卖出去的门道。

segments.text: Man: To magazines and newspapers, you mean?
segments.translation: 你是说卖给杂志和报纸？

segments.text: Official: Yes, mostly to the publishing industry.
segments.translation: 对，主要是卖给出版行业。

segments.text: Man: Um … I'd love to …
segments.translation: 嗯……我很愿意……
